violations.text: Standing water was observed in the back storage area with an unknown origin. Establishment is to move any and all single service items and other products away from source of leak and pooling water and sanitize storage equipment. A package of straws was observed in direct contact with potential source of contamination and was voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The drywall for the wall in the hallway area for the women's room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, a leak developed within the plumbing system that runs behind dry wall and has slowly degraded wall surface. PIC provided a copy of work order for service to be performed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2026

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Sanitizer container was observed empty and was replaced during the time of inspection. Concentration was tested at 100ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/03/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the roost walk-in cooler fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by grease tray from fryer. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Grease tray was moved during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The can opener was washed, rinsed, and sanitized at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2024

The doors to the outside, located by the front counter and walk-in cooler, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The ventilation system hood system was observed with an excess of food debris. Hood system is to be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to have hood system cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of Ice. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023

The condensate from the walk in freezer refrigeration unit is accumulating around the door. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to scrape off ice from around door frame and surrounding floor, and dispose of build up. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2023
